attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LIST_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LIST_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.AUTOMATIC_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ROUNDING_FACTOR, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SHIP_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.TERMS_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.DISCOUNT_LINES_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.GSA_INDICATOR, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PRORATE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ASK_FOR_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ACTIVE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PARENT_LIST_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE_FIRST, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE_FIRST, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ACTIVE_DATE_FIRST_TYPE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE_SECOND, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE_SECOND, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ACTIVE_DATE_SECOND_TYPE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LIMIT_EXISTS_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.MOBILE_DOWNLOAD, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.CURRENCY_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PTE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LIST_SOURCE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ORIG_SYSTEM_HEADER_REF, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.ORIG_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.GLOBAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SHAREABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LOCKED_FROM_LIST_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B,
 (
 select LIST_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B
 minus
 select LIST_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LIST_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.LIST_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_QP_LIST_HEADERS_B)
